PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?season(COUNT(?race) AS ?raceCount) WHERE {
  ?driverChamp wdt:P31 wd:Q1000008 ; wdt:P1344 wd:Q9673 ; wdt:P361 ?season .
  ?constructorChamp wdt:P31 wd:Q1000007 ; wdt:P1344 wd:Q1057384 ; wdt:P361 ?season .
  ?race wdt:P179 ?season .
}
GROUP BY ?season
ORDER BY DESC(?raceCount)
